name: symphony-orchestrator
description: Symphony orchestrator — read-only codebase + Obsidian wiki Q&A. Watches a Linear board and answers question issues via the Claude Code CLI, producing answer.md (no PR).

scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.curate: npm run build && node dist/librarian/cli.js --librarian LIBRARIAN.md
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && node --test dist/test/*.test.js dist/test/librarian/*.test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && node dist/test/e2e.js && node dist/test/dev-e2e.js && node dist/test/librarian-e2e.js
